HGSS.646.0001:
Huh? I can’t hear you very well.
I wonder if it’s our connection?\f
Try calling again from somewhere else.
HGSS.646.0002:
Hello...
Anything new going on with you?\r
I’m the same as usual.\f
HGSS.646.0003:
There are stronger Gym Leaders
than me, you know. That’s no good!
HGSS.646.0004:
I think I’ve got some free time on
Sundays around noon.\f
Could you call me back then?
HGSS.646.0005:
Ah, wonderful!
I’ve got some free time right now.\f
Would you like to battle again? [0200,0000]
HGSS.646.0006:
I knew it. That’s just like you.\f
So, I’ll see you at the Fighting Dojo in
Saffron City then!
HGSS.646.0007:
I see...
You have the right to refuse an offer.\r
I shouldn’t have gotten my hopes up.\r
But I’m still a little disappointed...
HGSS.646.0008:
Do you really have some free time to
battle me?\f
If you’ve got plans with other people,
you should really do that first.
HGSS.646.0009:
I’ll be waiting in Saffron City’s
Fighting Dojo. Don’t forget!
HGSS.646.0010:
Yeah, this is Sabrina.
How are you doing?\f
HGSS.646.0011:
So, I’m pretty sure we made plans to
meet at the Fighting Dojo in\r
Saffron City... Did you really forget?
HGSS.646.0012:
I’ll tell you a little about a Psychic’s
training.\f
Psychic ability is the power to influence
people.\f
You close your eyes and clear your mind
of excessive thoughts...then you look\r
hard at your sleeping self.\f
That’s it.\f
True Psychics aren’t the kind who can
move things around with their minds.\f
It’s about controlling your own mind.
HGSS.646.0013:
You... You’ll become even stronger
than you are now, I know it...\f
You will defeat every Trainer you face
and eventually reach the\r
glowing glory...\f
I just wanted to tell you that.
Talk to you later!
HGSS.646.0014:
You are a great Trainer, with a good
balance between intellect, power, and\r
your heart.\f
But above all, the power of your heart
is what is special.\f
What do you think of honestly trying to
study how to be a Psychic once to see?\f
I bet you could become a better Psychic
than me if you tried...
